servers.name: search-web
servers.purpose: Live discovery tool backed by free key-less APIs per source tier: science via OpenAlex, Crossref, Europe PMC, DOAJ; books via Google Books, Open Library, Internet Archive, DOAB; institutions/extension/grower via OpenAlex, Internet Archive, Wikipedia. DuckDuckGo HTML is a last-resort top-up only.

servers.name: fetch-web
servers.purpose: Live document fetch tool for HTML, PDF, JSON, and text sources.

servers.name: parse-document
servers.purpose: Document parser for fetched HTML and PDF artifacts.
